title: Volgograd、Volgograd Oblast — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Volgograd、Volgograd Oblast的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Volgograd是Volgograd Oblast的一个城市，人口约1,010,000。Formerly Stalingrad, a heroic city on the Volga River known for its WWII memorial on Mamayev Kurgan and the Battle of Stalingrad history.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
